title: Virtual CFO Services Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Virtual CFO services in Mumbai. Financial planning, MIS, fundraising support, compliance management. Expert CA-led. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for Virtual CFO services in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides strategic Virtual CFO services in Mumbai, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, IBBI RV). CFO-level financial expertise for growing businesses at a fraction of full-time CFO cost.

What is Virtual CFO Services Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Monthly MIS reporting — P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow with departmental and segment-wise breakdowns. Financial planning — annual budgets, quarterly forecasts, scenario modelling. Working capital management — debtor/creditor monitoring, cash flow optimisation, banking relationship support. Fundraising and M&A support — financial models, valuation reports, due diligence coordination, investor negotiation support. Compliance management — tax planning, audit coordination, ROC filings, FEMA compliance. Board and management presentations with actionable financial insights. Lender compliance — bank covenant monitoring, stock statements, and periodic reporting.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor as Your Virtual CFO in Mumbai
  Mumbai's diverse business landscape — from trading companies and manufacturers to startups and professional services firms — requires CFO services adapted to each industry. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, IBBI RV) provides industry-specific financial leadership drawing on 15+ years of cross-sector experience. Our Goregaon West office provides regular in-person reviews and is accessible across Mumbai's western corridor. We handle complex scenarios including multi-entity group structures, foreign subsidiary compliance, transfer pricing, and multi-bank working capital management.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Financial diagnostic — assess books quality, systems, reporting gaps, compliance status. Step 2: Custom MIS design aligned with your business model and management needs. Step 3: Monthly financial close and MIS delivery with variance commentary. Step 4: Quarterly strategy sessions — performance review, forecasting, cash flow planning. Step 5: Ongoing compliance monitoring and tax planning. Step 6: Special projects — fundraising, M&A, restructuring — as needed.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need a Virtual CFO in Mumbai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062
  Customisable packages. Month-on-month engagement with no lock-in.

faqs.q: What size companies benefit from Virtual CFO in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Companies with turnover between Rs 1 crore and Rs 100 crores benefit most. Below Rs 1 crore, basic accounting may suffice. Above Rs 100 crores, a full-time CFO may be warranted. Virtual CFO bridges the gap with CFO-level expertise at SME-friendly pricing.

faqs.q: Can Virtual CFO handle banking and lender relationships?
faqs.a: Yes. We manage bank covenant compliance, prepare stock statements and QIS/MSOD reports, coordinate with bank auditors, and handle working capital limit renewals. We also support new banking facility applications with projections and documentation.

faqs.q: Is there a lock-in period for Virtual CFO engagement?
faqs.a: No. Our Virtual CFO service runs month-on-month with no lock-in. We recommend a minimum 3-month engagement for meaningful results, but there is no contractual commitment beyond each month.
